title: Citrusy Crunchy Mediterranean Kaffir-Lime-Leaf Galette
description: A romantic Mediterranean dish that combines the flavors of citrus and kaffir-lime-leaf with the crunch of almonds and the freshness of herbs.
instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together almond flour, Parmesan cheese, kaffir-lime-leaf, orange zest, and sea salt.
In a separate bowl, whisk together lemon juice, egg, and black pepper.
Add the wet ingredients to the dry ingredients and mix until a dough forms.
Turn the dough out onto a floured surface and knead a few times until it comes together.
Cut the dough in half and roll out each half into a thin circle.
Brush the edges of each circle with olive oil and fold the dough in half to form a galette shape.
Place the galettes on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper and brush the tops with olive oil.
Sprinkle the tops with almonds and bake for 20-25 minutes, or until golden brown.
Remove the galettes from the oven and let them cool for a few minutes before serving.
Garnish with fresh parsley and basil before serving.
